    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'
    ELSE CAST([a0].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [AlertType], [a0].[Message], [a0].[Severity], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'Info'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'
END AS [Icon], [a0].[CreatedAt], [a0].[IsRead]
FROM (
    SELECT [a].[Id], [a].[CreatedAt], [a].[DeviceId], [a].[IsRead], [a].[Message], [a].[Severity], [a].[Type]
    FROM [Alerts] AS [a]
    WHERE [a].[CreatedAt] >= @__start_0 AND [a].[CreatedAt] <= @__end_1 AND [a].[IsRead] = @__isRead_Value_2

) AS [a0]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [Type], [b].[Id], [b].[Name]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
2025-10-20 14:32:50.597 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (4ms) [Parameters=[@__fiveMinutesAgo_0='?' (DbType = DateTime2)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

(@p6, @p7, @p8, @p9, @p10, @p11, 1),
(@p12, @p13, @p14, @p15, @p16, @p17, 2),
(@p18, @p19, @p20, @p21, @p22, @p23, 3)) AS i ([Current], [DeviceId], [PowerConsumptionKW], [Temperature], [Timestamp], [Voltage], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([Current], [DeviceId], [PowerConsumptionKW], [Temperature], [Timestamp], [Voltage])
VALUES (i.[Current], i.[DeviceId], i.[PowerConsumptionKW], i.[Temperature], i.[Timestamp], i.[Voltage])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[Id], i._Position;

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]

    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'

FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]

    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0

2025-10-20 17:17:07.387 +03:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (17ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))

FROM [Devices] AS [d]

    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]

    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'

    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]

    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]

        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]

    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id] AS [Id0], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name] AS [Name0], [z].[Type] AS [Type0]
    FROM [Devices] AS [d]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]

    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]

    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]

    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]
ORDER BY [z].[Name], [d].[Name]

FROM [Devices] AS [d]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[InstallationDate], [d].[IsActive], [d].[Name], [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[Type], [d].[ZoneId], [z].[Id], [z].[Area], [z].[BuildingId], [z].[Name], [z].[Type], [e0].[Id], [e0].[Current], [e0].[DeviceId], [e0].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e0].[Temperature], [e0].[Timestamp], [e0].[Voltage]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e].[Id], [e].[Current], [e].[DeviceId], [e].[PowerConsumptionKW], [e].[Temperature], [e].[Timestamp], [e].[Voltage]
    FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    WHERE [e].[Timestamp] >= @__fiveMinutesAgo_0
) AS [e0] ON [d].[Id] = [e0].[DeviceId]
WHERE [d].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [z].[Id], [e0].[Timestamp] DESC

    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]
ORDER BY [z].[Name], [d].[Name]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Name], CASE [d].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'WaterHeater'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Lights'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'TV'
    WHEN 7 THEN N'Microwave'
    WHEN 99 THEN N'Other'
    ELSE CAST([d].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END, [b].[Id], [b].[Name], [e1].[PowerKW], [e1].[c]
FROM [Devices] AS [d]
INNER JOIN [Zones] AS [z] ON [d].[ZoneId] = [z].[Id]
INNER JOIN [Buildings] AS [b] ON [z].[BuildingId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [e0].[PowerKW], [e0].[c], [e0].[DeviceId]
    FROM (
        SELECT [e].[PowerConsumptionKW] AS [PowerKW], 1 AS [c], [e].[DeviceId], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [e].[DeviceId] ORDER BY [e].[Timestamp] DESC) AS [row]
        FROM [EnergyReadings] AS [e]
    ) AS [e0]
    WHERE [e0].[row] <= 1
) AS [e1] ON [d].[Id] = [e1].[DeviceId]
ORDER BY [z].[Name], [d].[Name]

SELECT [a0].[Id], [d].[Name] AS [DeviceName], [z].[Name] AS [ZoneName], CASE [a0].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'HighConsumption'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Anomaly'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Wastage'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'DeviceOffline'
    ELSE CAST([a0].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
END AS [AlertType], [a0].[Message], [a0].[Severity], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'Info'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'Warning'
    ELSE N'Critical'
END AS [SeverityLabel], CASE
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 1 THEN N'🔵'
    WHEN [a0].[Severity] = 2 THEN N'🟡'
    ELSE N'🔴'

    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [a0]

ORDER BY [a0].[CreatedAt] DESC

    WHEN 1 THEN N'AirConditioner'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'Refrigerator'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'WashingMachine'

END, [d].[RatedPowerKW], [d].[IsActive], [z].[Id], [z].[Name], CASE [z].[Type]
    WHEN 1 THEN N'Bedroom'
    WHEN 2 THEN N'LivingRoom'
    WHEN 3 THEN N'Kitchen'
    WHEN 4 THEN N'Bathroom'
    WHEN 5 THEN N'Balcony'
    WHEN 6 THEN N'Garage'
    ELSE CAST([z].[Type] AS nvarchar(max))
